title: nelensia
intro: Nelensia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The Nelensia plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nelensia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
